description:
Choose a license (MIT is the Elixir-ecosystem convention; user decision) and add:
- `LICENSE` file at repo root.
- `licenses: ["MIT"]` (or chosen) inside the `package:` block (B1).

hex.pm requires a declared license and expects the file to exist; without it adopters cannot legally use the package.

Acceptance: LICENSE present at root; `licenses:` populated; `mix hex.build` shows the license.

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: impl-worker (mutagen-y8o.2/add-license-file)
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex-add-license-file/<session-uuid>.jsonl

Commit: c7f4a01
Files touched: LICENSE (new), mix.exs
Tests added: none (metadata-only ticket; no test files changed)
Verification stubs flipped: none

Summary: Created the standard MIT license text at the repo root (copyright Manuel Zubieta, 2026) and added a minimal package/0 block to mix.exs containing only licenses: ["MIT"], wired in via package: package() in project/0. The package block is intentionally minimal so sibling ticket mutagen-y8o.1 can extend it with description/links/maintainers. Verified: mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean; mix hex.build reports `Licenses: MIT` and bundles `LICENSE` in Files. The "Missing metadata fields: description, links" warning from hex.build is expected and owned by B1 (mutagen-y8o.1), not a failure for this ticket.

title: Add LICENSE file + licenses key
